name: Second State
description: WebAssembly runtime provider and creator of WasmEdge, enabling Rust-based serverless and edge applications.

seo.title: Second State — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Second State: WebAssembly runtime provider and creator of WasmEdge, enabling Rust-based serverless and edge applications.

when_to_use: WasmEdge runtime for serverless Rust-based edge functions
WebAssembly execution in IoT devices and edge environments
WASI-NN-powered AI inference in WebAssembly containers
Fast and secure serverless compute via lightweight Wasm VMs
Running LLVM-compiled code safely in sandboxed edge apps

pros: WasmEdge is a serious Wasm runtime
cons: Ecosystem gaps vs Node or Python
review.verdict: Leading-edge Wasm runtime bet that pays off only if Wasm server-side takes off widely.
review.best_for: Teams exploring WebAssembly edge and serverless for performance-critical workloads
review.not_for: Mainstream production apps, JavaScript-centric teams, or conservative tech choices
